content.text: Now for Fix 1 — the `CardTitle` is inside a `<div>` which is inside `<CardHeader>`. The conformance rule says `CardTitle` must be inside `Card` or `CardHeader` (as a direct child). I need to move `CardTitle` out of the `<div>` wrapper and make it a direct child of `<CardHeader>`.
Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. Let me verify both fixes are properly applied:

1. **Fix 1 (Line 347)**: `<CardTitle>` is now a direct child of `<CardHeader>` (line 337), moved out of the `<div>` wrapper. The `<div>` (line 338) now only contains `<ClusterAppDropdown>` and closes at line 346, then `<CardTitle>` follows as a sibling at line 347, still inside `<CardHeader>`.

2. **Fix 2 (Line 37)**: `Text` → `Content` in the import (line 37), and both JSX usages changed from `<Text>` to `<Content>` (lines 250, 260) with matching closing tags.

All imports are still referenced — `Content` is used in two places, `CardBody`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `Card` are all still used. No orphaned imports remain.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `sd-cf-card-title-in-card-or-header` (Line 346)
**Applied.** Moved `<CardTitle>` out of the intermediate `<div className="mco-dashboard__contentColumn">` wrapper so it is a direct child of `<CardHeader>`, satisfying the PF v6 conformance rule that `CardTitle` must be inside `Card` or `CardHeader`. The `<div>` wrapper now only contains the `<ClusterAppDropdown>`, and `<CardTitle>` follows it as a sibling within `<CardHeader>`.

### Fix 2 — `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` (Line 37)
**Applied.** Replaced deprecated `Text` component with `Content`:
- Import changed from `Text` to `Content` (line 37)
- Two JSX usages in `ClusterAppCardTitle` changed from `<Text>`/`</Text>` to `<Content>`/`</Content>` (lines 250 and 260), preserving all existing props (`className`) and children
